description:
Set up a complete blended outbound/inbound campaign in Vicidial for PacificShield Health's 2026 Open Enrollment period. Log in to the Vicidial Admin at http://localhost/vicidial/admin.php (User: 6666, Password: andromeda).

Campaign: Create campaign ID 'PSHLTH26', name 'PacificShield Open Enrollment 2026', Active Y, Dial Method RATIO, Auto Dial Level 1.5, Campaign Recording ALLCALLS, Campaign CallerID '8005550126'.

Leads: Create a new List ID 8800 named 'PacificShield Enrollment'. Import leads from /home/ga/Documents/VicidialData/enrollment_leads.csv into this list using the Lead Loader.

Script: Create script 'PS_ENROLL' ('PacificShield Enrollment Script') with open enrollment messaging that includes Vicidial variable tokens --A--first_name--B-- and --A--last_name--B--. Assign it to the PSHLTH26 campaign.

Dispositions: Add these campaign statuses to PSHLTH26: ENROLD (Enrolled Successfully, Sale: Y, Human Answered: Y), DECLIN (Declined Coverage, Human Answered: Y), CALLBK (Callback Requested, Scheduled Callback: Y, Human Answered: Y), NOELIG (Not Eligible, Human Answered: Y), HANGUP (Hung Up).

Business Hours: Create Call Time 'PS_HOURS' ('PacificShield Business Hours') for Monday-Friday, 0900-1800.

Voicemail: Create Voicemail Box 8800 named 'PacificShield VM', password 7890, Active Y.

Inbound: Create Inbound Group 'PS_INBOUND' ('PacificShield Inbound') using Call Time PS_HOURS. Set After Hours Action to VOICEMAIL with mailbox 8800. Enable blended mode on PSHLTH26: set Allow Closers to Y and add PS_INBOUND to its Closer Campaigns.

Lead Recycling: Configure for PSHLTH26: Status NA with 1800-second delay and 4 max attempts; Status B with 900-second delay and 6 max attempts. Both active.
